title: Guest-ready relay: trigger the hidden cabinet and place the marked decor
task: Get the home guest-ready. Put the plate onto the bedroom floor, move the designated decor item from the lounge onto the correct living-room table, and leave the designated kitchen cabinet open when you are done.

agent_0: agent_0 may send at most 1 message.
agent_0 may only send messages to: agent_2.
For the shared task, the designated kitchen cabinet is cabinet_37 in kitchen_1.
For the shared task, acting on counter_44 in lounge_1 opens cabinet_37 in kitchen_1.
agent_1: agent_1 may send at most 1 message.
agent_1 may only send messages to: agent_2.
For the shared task, the designated decor item is picture_frame_2 on counter_44 in lounge_1.
For the shared task, the correct living-room destination surface for the designated decor item is table_25 in living_room_1.
agent_2: agent_2 may send at most 1 message.
agent_2 may only send messages to: agent_0.
For the shared task, plate_5 is on chair_14 in lounge_2 and must end on floor_bedroom_1 in bedroom_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem scene_108294870_176710551)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    hallway_1 balcony_1 balcony_2 bedroom_1 kitchen_1 lounge_1 lounge_2 living_room_1 - room
    picture_frame_2 plate_5 - object
    floor_bedroom_1 cabinet_37 counter_44 chair_14 table_25 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 hallway_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 balcony_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 balcony_2)
    (is_in_room floor_bedroom_1 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_37 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room counter_44 lounge_1)
    (is_in_room chair_14 lounge_2)
    (is_in_room table_25 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room picture_frame_2 lounge_1)
    (is_on_top picture_frame_2 counter_44)
    (is_in_room plate_5 lounge_2)
    (is_on_top plate_5 chair_14)
  )
  (:goal (and
      (is_on_top plate_5 floor_bedroom_1)
      (is_on_top picture_frame_2 table_25)
      (is_open cabinet_37)
      (K agent_0 (K agent_2 (is_open cabinet_37)))
    ))
)
